_readme: SR7 PREMIUM VIDEO PLAYER — DOMAIN AUTH DATA v2.1
_instructions: 1. Upload this file to a PUBLIC GitHub repo at any path you like.
2. Get the raw URL: open the file on GitHub, click 'Raw', copy the URL.
3. Convert that raw URL to char codes and paste into FILE-2 _au array.
4. To add a domain: generate its token with the formula below, add entry to domains array.
5. To remove a domain: delete its object from domains array.
6. Commit and push — changes are live immediately. No theme edits needed.
SALT: NEVER change the salt value after first publish. Changing it invalidates ALL tokens.
DOMAIN FORMAT: lowercase, no www prefix, no trailing slash. e.g. 'example.com'

domains._note: Your own admin Blogger domain — already bypassed in JS but listed for completeness
EXAMPLE — replace with real customer domain and regenerated token
